scripts.lint: npm run check:architecture-guardrails --silent && npm run check:code-principles --silent && tsc --pretty false -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && tsc --pretty false -p apps/shell/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --pretty false -p apps/backend/tsconfig.test.json && node --test packages/plugin-contracts/test/parse-plugin-contract.test.mjs packages/plugin-contracts/test/event-emitter.test.mjs packages/plugin-contracts/test/theme-derivation.test.mjs packages/plugin-contracts/test/theme-service.test.mjs packages/plugin-contracts/test/plugin-services.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-loader-parity.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-registry-parity.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-capability-registry.test.mjs apps/shell/test/integration-hardening.test.mjs apps/shell/test/part-module-host.test.mjs apps/shell/test/intent-activation-boundary.test.mjs apps/shell/test/theme-registry.test.mjs apps/shell/test/theme-persistence.test.mjs apps/shell/test/theme-default-plugin-contract.test.mjs apps/shell/test/shadcn-theme-bridge.test.mjs apps/shell/test/appearance-settings-panel.test.mjs apps/shell/test/plugin-service-access.test.mjs apps/shell/test/theme-service-registration.test.mjs apps/shell/test/theme-activation.test.mjs apps/shell/src/action-runtime.integration.test.mjs apps/shell/dist-test/src/context-state.spec.js apps/shell/dist-test/src/window-bridge.spec.js apps/backend/test/local-ui-plugin-discovery.test.mjs apps/backend/test/tenant-manifest-overrides.test.mjs apps/backend/test/dev-cli-options.test.mjs
scripts.dev:plugin:all: npx concurrently -n starter,sample,unplanned,vessel,shared,theme,shadcn,appearance -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green,blue,red,white,gray "npm run dev:plugin" "npm run dev:plugin-sample" "npm run dev:plugin-unplanned-orders" "npm run dev:plugin-vessel-view" "npm run dev:plugin-shared-ui" "npm run dev:plugin-theme-default" "npm run dev:plugin-shadcn-bridge" "npm run dev:plugin-appearance"
